account_dashboard_page.first_time_user_c: Say "hello" to Studio with this easy guide that takes you from start to finish, helping you explore key features and publish your first experience.
Augment real-world locations by building a project that uses Niantic Spatial VPS to precisely anchor content to real-world places.
Grow cacti (or anything) anywhere in the world with this guided tutorial of using our world effects with tap to place experience.
account_dashboard_page.first_time_user_m: To kick off your journey, we've created three exciting starter experiences tailored just for you. As you build, we’ll share helpful tips to guide you.
Click here to try out three starter experiences to learn Studio the easy way. Get started today!
accounts_page.heading: Workspaces
accounts_page.blurb: A Workspace is a logical grouping of Users and Applications. Grouping Applications under the same Workspace allows you to view consolidated usage. Workspaces can contain one or more Users, each with different permissions. Users can belong to multiple Workspaces.
